name: Impact.com Partnership Automation API
what_it_does: Impact.com Partnership Automation Platform REST API for affiliate, influencer, B2B, and partner program management. Enables AI agents to manage affiliate and partner recruitment and onboarding for partnership program scaling, handle commission tracking and payment automation for performance marketing compensation, access click and conversion attribution for multi-touch partnership analytics, retrieve influencer and content partner performance data for creator program management, manage partner contract and term management for partnership governance, handle fraud detection and invalid traffic filtering for performance marketing quality, access cross-device and cross-channel attribution modeling for partnership ROI measurement, retrieve real-time reporting and dashboard for partnership program optimization, manage partner communication and newsletter automation for partner engagement, and integrate Impact partnership data with DMP, CRM, and financial systems.
use_cases: Recruiting affiliates from partner program agents
Tracking partner commissions from performance marketing agents
Attributing conversions from marketing analytics agents
Managing influencer programs from creator partnership agents
not_for: Small businesses without dedicated partnership program budget
Direct sales organizations without partner/affiliate channels
Organizations using Commission Junction or Rakuten exclusively
best_when: A brand or enterprise with an established affiliate, influencer, or B2B partner program using Impact.com wants AI agents to automate partner recruitment, commission tracking, attribution, and partner communication.
avoid_when: FTC DISCLOSURE RISK: Automated influencer and affiliate content creation or amplification must include required FTC material connection disclosures (#ad, #sponsored); automated content without disclosure creates FTC enforcement risk. Commission fraud risk — automated commission approval without fraud validation creates exposure to click fraud, cookie stuffing, and attribution manipulation by unscrupulous affiliates. Payment compliance — automated commission payments to international partners must comply with OFAC sanctions screening and may trigger international wire transfer reporting requirements.

auth.notes: Impact.com uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.impact.com. Webhooks for partnership events. REST API with JSON. Santa Barbara, California HQ. Founded 2008 by Per Pettersen, Todd Crawford. Private (Providence Equity, Insight Partners). $100M+ revenue. 2,500+ brand customers. 300,000+ partners on platform. Partnership automation market leader. Competes with Rakuten Advertising, Partnerize, and CJ Affiliate for partnership management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; percentage of managed spend fee
pricing.notes: Santa Barbara, CA. Founded 2008. Providence Equity/Insight Partners-backed. 2,500+ brands. 300,000+ partners. Partnership automation leader. Competes with Rakuten and Partnerize.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FTC DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT: Automated influencer content amplification or affiliate recommendation must include FTC-required material connection disclosure; automated content without #ad or #sponsored creates FTC enforcement risk and brand liability

Commission fraud detection — automated commission approval without fraud scoring allows click fraud, cookie stuffing, and last-click attribution manipulation; implement fraud validation before automated payment approval
OFAC payment screening — automated commission payments to international affiliates require OFAC SDN screening; payments to sanctioned individuals or entities create federal compliance violations

Attribution model sensitivity — automated budget optimization based on Impact attribution data is sensitive to attribution model choice (last-click vs multi-touch); model changes affect automated budget allocation significantly

Partner contract term enforcement — automated commission rate changes must comply with partner contract terms; unilateral automated rate changes below contracted minimums create breach of contract liability

GDPR tracking consent — Impact attribution tracking uses cookies and device fingerprinting; EU/UK affiliate programs must implement cookie consent and respect opt-out; automated tracking without consent violates GDPR
agent_readiness.security_notes: Partnership automation. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Partner and commission data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Partnership marketing. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Partner and conversion data.
